query:
SELECT b.id, b.name, b.criterionType, b.criterionValue, b.isActive
FROM badges b
WHERE b.name LIKE '%Boas%' OR b.name LIKE '%boas%' OR b.criterionType = 'first_bet';

SELECT ub.id, ub.userId, ub.badgeId, ub.earnedAt
FROM user_badges ub
JOIN users u ON u.id = ub.userId
WHERE u.name LIKE '%Gerva%' OR u.name LIKE '%Marcos%';
